## Scope check

- [ ] This stays within rvt-rs's stated scope (reading / parsing /
      writing Revit files without Autodesk software).
- [ ] I've read the README Reverse-engineering-state table and this
      doesn't conflict with an open moat layer.
- [ ] If it touches the IFC exporter, I've checked the mapping
      plan in `src/ifc/mod.rs`.
